title: HotbarShuffler
description: HotbarShuffler can randomly select certain slots in your hotbar to assist you with building and texturing.
body:
![Hotbar Shuffler](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c290f23c77d9daf468a311b8ff7bbd48f2b85cb.png)

HotbarShuffler can randomly select certain slots in your hotbar to assist you with building and texturing.

# Features
- Randomized hotbar slot selection
- Enabling / Disabling of hotbar slots
- Visual marking of the slots that are selected for the randomizer
- Hotkey for activation / deactivation (default F7)
- Ingame Config accessible via keybinding (default N)

# Support
For support add me on Discord using "Skytendo06" or create an issue on github.
